productDisplayName: Nike Men White Air Max Full Court Sports Shoes
description: Style Note Bag that hoop with this pair of nike Air Max Full Court 2 shoes. Designed for Basketball lovers, this shoe adds an urban flair to the classic sport shoe and ensures optimum performance. Product Details Synthetic leather upper with synthetic nike swoosh overlay in the midfoot region Perforations in the forefoot and midfoot region for enhanced breathability Meshed and padded tongue and collar for snug comfort and a padded fabric lining for optimal performance Lacing system for a customised Fit with a padded footbed for all-day comfort Encapsulated Air-Sole unit for impact protection  Full length phylon midsole for optimum cushioning and lightweight comfort Waffle pattern lugs on the outsole for absolute grip and traction Flex grooves for easy movement of the forefoot Material and Care Synthetic Use a branded shoe polish to keep your footwear clean  Do not store under sunlight
